final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a bustling winter park scene under bright midday sun. In the CENTER FOREGROUND stands a man with curly dark hair, wearing a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt, beige chinos, and white sneakers, standing on a thick layer of pristine white snow. To his RIGHT (viewer's right) sits a golden retriever with paws slightly sunk in the snow. Behind them are two wooden park benches: one in BACKGROUND LEFT occupied by a couple, and one in BACKGROUND RIGHT occupied by a single person sitting sideways on the bench, facing left towards the center, holding an open book and actively reading. Additional people include children building snowmen near the LEFT tree, a jogger in a red jacket on the path behind the benches, three friends laughing near the RIGHT bench, and a family walking toward the waterfront. Bare trees stand MIDGROUND LEFT and CENTER with mounded snow at their bases. The FAR BACKGROUND shows calm water and a hazy city skyline under a pale blue sky. Sunlight from the upper left casts crisp shadows on the detailed snow texture. Photorealistic, sharp focus, cheerful winter atmosphere.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a bustling winter park scene under bright midday sun. In the CENTER FOREGROUND stands a man with curly dark hair, wearing a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt, beige chinos, and white sneakers — his pose and expression identical to original, now standing on a thick layer of pristine white snow that covers the entire ground from foreground to background. To his RIGHT (viewer’s right) sits a golden retriever, its fluffy golden coat contrasting against the snow, paws slightly sunk into the soft surface. Behind them, two wooden park benches — one BACKGROUND LEFT, one BACKGROUND RIGHT — are occupied by people in winter coats: a couple sharing the left bench, a solo reader on the right. Additional people populate the scene: children building snowmen near the LEFT tree, a jogger in red jacket moving along the path behind the benches, three friends laughing near the RIGHT bench, and a family walking hand-in-hand toward the distant waterfront. Trees with bare branches (indicating winter) stand MIDGROUND LEFT and CENTER, their trunks surrounded by mounded snow. The far BACKGROUND reveals calm water and a hazy city skyline under a pale blue sky. Sunlight streams from upper left, casting crisp, elongated shadows of people and objects onto the snow. Snow texture is detailed — footprints, slight drifts around benches, undisturbed patches between groups. Atmosphere is cheerful, active, and crisply cold. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural winter colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing forward toward man and dog centered in frame; Spatial positions: Man CENTER FOREGROUND, dog RIGHT FOREGROUND, benches BACKGROUND LEFT and RIGHT, trees MIDGROUND LEFT and CENTER, water/skyline FAR BACKGROUND; Lighting quality: bright midday sun from upper left, casting defined shadows now visible on snow surface. Style reference: Lighting quality: bright midday sun from upper left, casting defined shadows now visible on snow surface; Dominant color palette: originally green grass + blue sky → transformed to white snow + blue sky + colorful winter coats; Surface materials: grass replaced by packed snow texture; benches retain wood grain; dog fur unchanged; man’s clothes unchanged; Overall atmosphere: lively winter park day — active, cold but sunny, bustling with activity.

constraints: The image is an eye-level photograph perspective facing forward.
The scene depicts a park during winter with bright midday sunlight.
A man with curly dark hair stands in the center foreground.
The man wears a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt, beige chinos, and white sneakers.
The ground from foreground to background is covered in a thick layer of pristine white snow.
A golden retriever sits to the right of the man (viewer's right) in the foreground.
The golden retriever's paws are slightly sunk into the snow.
A wooden park bench occupied by a couple is located in the background left.
A wooden park bench occupied by a solo reader is located in the background right.
Children building snowmen are visible near a tree on the left side.
A jogger wearing a red jacket is moving along a path behind the benches.
Three friends laughing are positioned near the right bench.
A family walking hand-in-hand is heading toward the distant waterfront.
Trees with bare branches stand in the midground left and center.
Mounded snow surrounds the trunks of the trees.
Calm water and a hazy city skyline are visible in the far background.
The sky is pale blue.
Sunlight streams from the upper left, casting crisp, elongated shadows on the snow.
The snow surface shows detailed textures including footprints and slight drifts around benches.
The overall atmosphere appears cheerful, active, and cold.
The image style is photorealistic with sharp focus and natural winter colors.
